task_completion.description: Create enclosed exterior walls and interior partition walls dividing the space into at least four named rooms: Living Room, Bedroom, Bathroom, and Kitchen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D floor plan shows a closed outer boundary of walls, interior walls dividing the space into at least four distinct areas, and text labels explicitly naming the 'Living Room', 'Bedroom', 'Bathroom', and 'Kitchen'.

task_completion.description: Include at least one exterior door, two interior doors, and four windows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Door and window models/symbols placed on the walls in the 2D plan or 3D view. There must be at least 1 door on an outer wall, 2 doors on interior walls, and 4 windows total.

task_completion.description: Furnish the cabin with at least one bed and one sofa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least one bed and one sofa are visible within the rooms in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Furnish the cabin with at least one table, four chairs, and two kitchen appliances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least one table, four chairs, and two kitchen appliances (e.g., refrigerator, oven, stove) are visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Furnish the cabin with at least one toilet and one sink.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least one toilet and one sink are visible, typically placed in the bathroom area.

task_completion.description: Document key clearances with at least three dimension lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least three dimension lines (lines with measurement numbers, e.g., '120 cm' or '3 m') are drawn on the 2D floor plan.
The Sweet Home 3D application title bar shows 'vacation_cabin.sh3d', or a file manager/terminal shows the file successfully saved in the /home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the cabin.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application open with active interaction (mouse cursor moving, tools selected, dragging furniture from the catalog), rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent created the plan from scratch rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A progression of screenshots showing the empty grid initially, followed by walls being drawn, rooms defined, and furniture added sequentially.

integrity.description: Agent did not generate the .sh3d file using a script or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The design is actively built and modified within the Sweet Home 3D graphical interface, not by writing XML or running a python script to generate the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the saved design is verified to be '/home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/vacation_cabin.sh3d'.
